description_long: This car store is a two-story commercial building with a modern, angular design and a light tan stone or concrete exterior. The front facade features large, dark-framed glass windows and doors, providing visibility into the showroom and service areas. The building is L-shaped, with a main entrance at the corner and a prominent overhang above the entryway. Multiple cars are parked in front of the building, including a red sports car, a blue sedan, and a yellow compact car, suggesting both display and customer parking. Illuminated signage is visible above the main entrance and along the facade, indicating the building's function as a car dealership and service center. The surrounding area includes a spacious, marked parking lot with street lamps and clear vehicle access.
description: A modern, L-shaped car dealership with large glass windows, tan stone exterior, and multiple cars displayed in a spacious parking lot.
description_view_0: The front and side of the car store are visible, showing large glass windows, illuminated signage, and several cars parked in front.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main entrance, prominent signage, and a clear view of the parking lot with cars arranged in front of the building.
description_view_2: The rear of the building is shown, with a plain tan wall and minimal architectural features, and the parking lot extending behind.
description_view_3: A side view of the building, showing the long, unadorned tan wall and a portion of the parking lot with a single yellow car visible.
attribute_signage: Illuminated signage is present above the main entrance and along the front facade, with text indicating 'Pre-Owned Vehicles' and 'Sales & Service Dept'. The signage is mounted on the building and uses bright, backlit lettering.
attribute_displayed_cars: Four cars are visible: a red sports car, a blue sedan, a yellow compact car, and a white SUV, all parked in front of the building and in the parking lot.
attribute_glass_facade: Large, dark-framed glass windows are present on the front and side facades, spanning both floors and providing visibility into the showroom and service areas.
attribute_showroom_lighting: No interior lighting fixtures are visible from the exterior views provided.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, with clean lines, large glass panels, and a minimalist tan stone or concrete exterior.
